retryPolicy: progress-based (not count-based) — escalate only on stuck-loop / regression-net-negative / product-ambiguity
openBlockers: VISUAL FIDELITY — design bundle ignored. implementation matches tokens (accent #2d5fa0, cream bg) but NOT typography (no Instrument Serif, no JetBrains Mono), layout (no breadcrumb / subtitle / filter pills / search), affordances (no status chips with icons, no chart-kind icons, no member chips on cards), palette depth (only --accent + --bg-paper, missing every --ink-*, --bg-elev/sunk, --m-* member palette tone). Bundle README explicitly states: 'recreate them pixel-perfectly'.

FRONT-END ARCHITECTURE — raw CSS files used; design tokens flat. Required: Tailwind v4 utilities inline on JSX (no per-component .css), atomic design (atoms/molecules/organisms), design tokens via @theme declarations bridging the prototype's CSS variables to Tailwind utilities.
